name: io.github.hubertgajewski/playwright-report-mcp
description: Run Playwright tests and surface structured results for AI agents doing test failure analysis.

environmentVariables.name: PW_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Root of the Playwright project — used as the working directory when running tests. Defaults to process.cwd().

environmentVariables.name: PW_RESULTS_FILE
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the JSON reporter output file. Defaults to <PW_DIR>/test-results/results.json.
